TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Turkey hya' ga cyux maki' tay 39 00 N, 35 00 E na Aziya' ru Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 783,562 sq km (maki' tay 37ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 769,632 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 13,930 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 80,274,604. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga49.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 14.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 35.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ankara. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 29 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, aring ryax 28 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' panmwo:commons CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: turkej ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē ru o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ankara. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a re ¶~ ®ep tajjip er*o*an, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē panmwo: ¶~ ®ommons~…ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Turkey hya' ga cyux maki' tay 39 00 N, 35 00 E na Aziya' ru Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 783,562 sq km (maki' tay 37ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 769,632 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 13,930 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 80,274,604. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga49.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 14.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 35.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ankara. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 29 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, aring ryax 28 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' panmwo:commons CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: turkej ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē ru o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ankara. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a re ¶~ ®ep tajjip er*o*an, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē panmwo: ¶~ ®ommons~…ē ¶~ ®ia ***
